description: Defines data transfer objects for authentication requests such as registration, login, resend verification, and verify link, primarily used in API interactions.

classes.name: AuthRequests
classes.description: Container class for various authentication-related request DTOs.

classes.name: RegisterRequest
classes.description: Data transfer object for user registration requests.

classes.name: LoginRequest
classes.description: Data transfer object for user login requests.

classes.name: ResendVerificationRequest
classes.description: Data transfer object for resending verification emails.

classes.name: VerifyLinkRequest
classes.description: Data transfer object for email verification link validation.
